{{Quote|Let me go!|Princess Kneesaa|<ref name="Baga's Rival">{{Ewoks|Baga's Rival}}</ref>}}
'''Quarfs''' were shapeshifting creatures that had the ability to fly and send signals through a horn on the middle of their foreheads. The only known quarf was seen on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]], nicknamed "[[Silky]]" by young [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] from [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]]. In reality, "Silky" was the servant of the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Enchantress]] [[Jadru]], sent to kidnap the Ewoks' [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Princess]].

[[File:Kneesaa_and_Silky.jpg|thumb|left|200px|"[[Silky]]" in his transformed disguise.]]

Quarfs had powerful shape shifting abilities, and "Silky" was able to change his reptilian appearance into that of a beautiful [[Horse/Legends|horse]]-shaped creature, hiding his wings. Quarfs had excellent hearing as well as the ability to send signals to their "masters" from the prominent horn displayed on their brow, which stayed displayed even after shape shifting. They also were strong beasts and could carry a rider on their back as they flew through the air. Although Quarfs could follow complicated instructions, they served as pets and were never seen displaying conscious decision making abilities.
